name: Sliced Kiwi and Banana with Strawberry Puree
recipeInstructions:
1. Place strawberries in blender with lemon juice and 1/4 cup water. (Thawed unsweetened strawberries could be substituted). Blend until smooth.
2. Press through fine strainer into medium-sized saucepan.
- Sauce may foam as it cooks, so ensure you have enough space for this.
3. Add sugar to the mixture; bring to a boil.
4. Lower heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
5. Mix cornstarch with 1 tablespoon water. Stir into the mixture for 1 to 2 minutes or until thickened.
6. Remove from heat and cool before chilling.
7. Just before serving, peel kiwis and bananas.
8. Place several tablespoons of strawberry mixture in each corner of dessert plates.
9. Slice 1 kiwi and half a banana into overlapping semicircles around the pool of sauce.
- Any leftover strawberry mixture is delicious on ice cream.
